title: Trigger kill_self
description: Allows you to run the command /trigger kill_self and kill the player in-game
body:
# Kill Self Datapack

The **Kill Self** datapack adds a simple utility command that lets players kill themselves in game  
Perfect for testing maps, servers, or just a quick reset when things go wrong.

## 📌 Features
- Adds the `/trigger kill_self` command automatically.  
- Works in survival, adventure, and creative mode.  
- Multiplayer friendly – each player can use it independently.  
- Lightweight and vanilla-friendly: no mods required.  

## 🚀 Installation
1. Download the latest release.  
2. Place the `.zip` file into your world’s `datapacks` folder.  
3. Run `/reload` in-game.  
4. Use `/trigger kill_self` to activate.  
For more information please refer to the **GitHub** guide

## ⚠️ Requirements
- Minecraft Java version 1.21.8 (as for now).
- Cheats enabled.
